candidate_a.title: Micro-batch Kitchens for Allergens
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Anxiety around cross-contamination in communal food spaces
candidate_a.core_concept: Visual transparency of food preparation for allergy-sensitive users.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A specialized meal prep service providing time-stamped video clips of the preparation process for specific orders.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Prepare 3 allergen-free meals for 5 users, providing a recorded video of the assembly process for each. | Define strict allergen-free protocols; Set up recording station; Prepare 15 meals with video proof; Gather feedback on trust levels

candidate_b.title: Micro-batch Kitchens for Allergens
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Anxiety around cross-contamination in communal food spaces
candidate_b.core_concept: A transparent preparation window enabled through recorded 24-hour visual feed accessibility
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Operating exclusively single-allergy micro kitchens, providing authenticated 'visual documentation' of all food assembly phases
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Testing pre-ordering on three specialized nutrient packs prepared under restricted 24/7 web camera documentation for five trial users

candidate_a.title: Collaborative Cold-Brew Barista Collective
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Long transit waiting times leading to inconsistent coffee intake due to unpredictable cafe wait times
candidate_a.core_concept: On-transit cold brew access optimized for commuter traffic patterns.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A mobile cold-brew cart stationed at a high-traffic commuter location, with inventory adjusted based on manual observation of train schedules.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A single mobile cart at one transit hub for 1 week, tracking sales against train arrival times. | Secure permit for one transit hub location.; Operate a mobile cart for 5 days.; Record sales volume vs train arrival times.

candidate_b.title: Collaborative Cold-Brew Barista Collective
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Long transit waiting times leading to inconsistent coffee intake due to unpredictable cafe wait times
candidate_b.core_concept: On-transit batch-chilled hydration stations replenished based on daily train scheduling metadata
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Deploying self-contained cold press kiosks that receive daily batch fills tuned to anticipated traffic on train lines
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Deploying one prototype vending interface in a specific bus transition hub managed with dynamic inventory logic

candidate_a.title: GiftGuard
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Losing track of birthdays, anniversary-gift history, and social relationship nuances
candidate_a.core_concept: Categorized notification system organized strictly by social relationship tiers
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Systemic reminder sequences filtered by proximity thresholds
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Personal profile vault holding name, key date, gift category tags, and past interaction dates for 5 dummy contacts

candidate_b.title: GiftGuard
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Losing track of birthdays, anniversary-gift history, and social relationship nuances
candidate_b.core_concept: Categorized gift tracking by relationship tier.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A simple CRM for personal relationships to track gift history.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A profile vault for contacts with gift history fields. | Build a contact list; Add fields for gift history; Implement a simple search/filter

candidate_a.title: Institutional Compost Loyalty Loop
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: High workplace organic waste volume with no benefit or impact reflection
candidate_a.core_concept: Closing the loop on office coffee waste by returning composted material to the office environment.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A closed-loop service that collects office coffee grounds and delivers finished compost from a local partner to the office's indoor/outdoor plants.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A pilot with 3 offices using a local community garden partner to process grounds and return finished compost. | Identify 3 offices with plant maintenance needs.; Partner with a local community garden for composting.; Establish a weekly bucket exchange schedule.

candidate_b.title: Institutional Compost Loyalty Loop
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: High workplace organic waste volume with no benefit or impact reflection
candidate_b.core_concept: Closing the loop on office grounds by returning enriched garden soil equivalents back to common spaces
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Pickup service providing reusable metal receptacles for spent coffee pucks; providing professional composting services and quarterly soil analytics
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Ten offices sharing a municipal processing pipeline with branded bucket exchange infrastructure

candidate_a.title: SyncMyBoard
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Mismatching players, times, and learning difficulty levels
candidate_a.core_concept: Profile matchmaking system optimized solely for complexity class requirements of game libraries
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Constraint matching where hosting users define acceptable game type metrics versus guest expertise filters
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Match creation form allowing search results filter based on complexity level and participant timezone matches

candidate_b.title: SyncMyBoard
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Mismatching players, times, and learning difficulty levels
candidate_b.core_concept: Matchmaking based on game complexity and player expertise.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A platform where users list games they want to play and their own experience level.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A simple match-making form. | Build a game listing form; Implement a search/filter for players; Add a simple messaging feature
